original_title: GENM-051 Re: start-To me when I made my debut-Eimi Fukada
overview: Commemorating 1 million followers. A project with all the staff celebrating. There is no script! Looking back on what we have done so far and what we have not done, we will restart on a new path. A whole new possibility to deliver in a documentary format while expecting her future!
